title: Configuration Settings: Initialization
text: Configuration Settings: Initialization Initialization settings are used to configure the application on a specific platform. Initialization files contain settings that are loaded when the Uniface application is started. The usys.ini file is the default initialization file for Uniface applications. You can optionally create a local .ini file for your application that can be specified using the /ini command line switch. Related Links usys.ini The usys.ini file is the default initialization file for Uniface applications. /ini Specify the initialization file or GUI resource file used by the application.
